channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: British police arrest Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor on suspicion of misconduct
item.description: British police confirmed that Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor -- formerly known as Prince Andrew -- was arrested on Thursday on suspicion of misconduct in ...

item.title: Inside the surge of threats against public officials fueling a rise in prosecutions
item.description: A CBS News analysis found 126 cases that were brought by federal prosecutors last year arising out of threats to public officials.

item.title: Former Prince Andrew arrested over Epstein files revelations
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, King Charles III's younger brother, has been arrested over suspected misconduct in public office after revelations in the ...

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
See the Olympics schedule for the 2026 Milano Cortina Games
item.description: This is what you need to know about when the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics start and end, along with key games and events on the schedule.

item.title: Federal tax dollars subsidize health care plans in ways you may not realize
item.description: Critics have questioned why the federal government should underwrite coverage costs for people with ACA health plans â but almost all health insurance...

item.title: WATCH: Eight skiers killed in deadliest ski-related avalanche in modern U.S. history
item.description: Nevada County Sheriff Shannan Moon said there were "whiteout conditions" during the rescue mission that saved six survivors.

item.title: WATCH: Lavender marriages appeal to new generation
item.description: While lavender marriages were often a necessity for the LGBTQ community in the 1950s, some younger generations are curious about them and other modern...

item.title: Parents of students at ski academy among California avalanche victims
item.description: The group of skiers involved in the deadly avalanche in California's Sierra Nevada Mountains on Tuesday includes parents of students at a local school...

item.title: Skiers with roots in Lake Tahoeâs alpine community among 8 killed in California avalanche
item.description: Authorities say the bodies of eight backcountry skiers have been found and one remains missing after an avalanche near Lake Tahoe in California.

item.title: Former South Korean President Yoon gets life sentence for imposing martial law
item.description: Former President Yoon Suk Yeol was sentenced to life in prison for briefly imposing martial law in a dramatic culmination to the country's biggest pol...

item.title: Early prenatal care, considered best for moms and babies, is on the decline in the US
item.description: Early prenatal care improves the chances of having a healthy pregnancy and baby

item.title: The backcountry ski trip hit by avalanche was led by an outfit offering mountain adventures globally
